facebook.caption:
POV: you take the cable car to Hòn Thơm and find a full water park waiting at the bottom.

Aquatopia Water Park sits on the southern tip of Phu Quoc. 4.3 stars across 4,215 reviews. Slides, wave pools, and ocean views all in one spot.

Most people don't realise the cable car ride is half the experience. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Cable car down. Water slides straight ahead. Aquatopia Water Park on Hòn Thơm hits different when the South China Sea is your backdrop. 4.3 stars. 4,215 people agree.

instagram.caption: POV: the cable car doors open and there's a water park. Aquatopia Water Park, Hòn Thơm. 4.3★, 4,215 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Dropped onto an island. Found a water park. Aquatopia Water Park on Hòn Thơm is not what you expect from Phu Quoc.

tiktok.caption: POV: cable car lands and there's a whole water park 🎢 Aquatopia Water Park, Hòn Thơm #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel #TravelReels
